data.title: 国际服开发笔记 & 新年问候 2023
data.summary: [Dev notes] Happy New Year! Dev notes from the Chief PD have arrived. Thank you for the love and sup
data.body:
[Dev notes]

Happy New Year! Dev notes from the Chief PD have arrived.
Thank you for the love and support you have shown to Blue Archive, Sensei!💙

#BlueArchive
